response.justification: The candidate is a strong hands-on senior engineer with roughly 18 years of broad full-stack, systems, and open-source experience, comfortably meeting the 15-year minimum. However, this is a director-level IC role centered on AI strategy, and the resume shows only about a year of recent AI-agent tooling work, no advanced degree in an AI-related field, no recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products at scale, and no evidence of operating at principal/director scope such as advising strategic customers or setting technical direction across organizations.
strengths: 18+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Founder of a long-running open-source geo-data platform, showing entrepreneurial initiative and ownership
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
concerns: No demonstrated director/principal-level scope, strategic advisory, or org-wide technical leadership
AI experience is shallow and recent relative to the role's requirement for recognized AI expertise
No master's or PhD in an AI-related field and no notable AI products or publications

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs. director-level IC scope
Meets 15-year experience minimum with broad engineering depth
